'''Michael Channing''' (born 30 June 1992) is a former [[Wales national rugby league team|Wales]] international [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].<ref name="Profile at loverugbyleague.com"/><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

He previously played for the [[London Broncos]] in his first spell at the club, [[Castleford Tigers]] in the First:Utility [[Super League]] and [[Featherstone Rovers]] in the Kingstone Press [[Championship (rugby league)|Championship]].

Channing is a Wales international having represented [[Wales national rugby league team|Wales]] in 6 test matches. His most recent appearances came in the [[2015 European Cup]] tournament after appearing 3 times beforehand in the [[2012 Autumn International Series]].<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>
